_meta.description: RC release configuration for the AppsFlyer Unity plugin. Unity publishes GitHub prerelease .unitypackage assets first, then validates those assets with post-publish smoke.
_meta.tooling_contract_ref: RC-PREP, RC-WRAPPER-PUBLISH, RC-WRAPPER-VALIDATE, RC-UNIT-TESTS, RC-E2E, RC-PUBLISH, RC-SMOKE, RC-PROMOTE, RC-RELEASE

RC-WRAPPER-PUBLISH.description: Publish com.appsflyer:unity-wrapper once per base semver (no -rc suffix) to Maven Central after RC-PREP.

RC-WRAPPER-VALIDATE.description: Confirm unity-wrapper exists on Maven Central (with --wait after publish) before build-package.

RC-UNIT-TESTS.description: Playmode tests on release branch (iOS, Android, Shared matrix). Runs in parallel with wrapper publish, package build, and E2E.

maven_wrapper.version_policy_note: AppsFlyerDependencies.xml references base_version (e.g. 6.18.0), never plugin RC suffix (6.18.0-rc1). Publish once per wrapper coord; RC-PROMOTE does not republish.

dry_run.validate: optional unity_wrapper_version input must point at an existing Central coord for Android E2E

maven_wrapper.patch_bump_note: When Java changes in a later RC (e.g. 6.18.0-rc2) but base coord 6.18.0 is immutable on Central, bump wrapper to 6.18.1 and publish that once.

RC-WRAPPER-VALIDATE.check_description: Maven com.appsflyer:unity-wrapper:<base_version> must resolve before Unity package build and Android E2E.

RC-UNIT-TESTS.check_run_name: iOS Test Results / Android Test Results / Shared Test Results
